products.description: Products require zones, weight tiers, canonical envelope format ids, services, features, and mark profiles

services.description: Services require features and price information

product_prices.description: Base postage grid (product_id × zone × weight_tier); file providers/<id>/prices/products.json (file_type product_prices)

service_prices.description: Service surcharge amounts; file providers/<id>/prices/services.json (file_type service_prices)

weights.description: Weight brackets (tier ids) are standalone definitions

envelopes.description: Global envelope id catalog: physical front size (mm); international baseline (e.g. ISO 269); file mails/envelopes.json

jurisdictions.description: UN/EU membership sets for restriction framework jurisdiction resolution

restrictions.description: Global destination restrictions (bundled as policy/restrictions.json); optional cross-reference to zones and products

limits.description: Provider operational limits extend global restrictions after load

features.description: Features are standalone definitions referenced by services

marks.description: Provider mark/stamp/label physical defaults; referenced optionally from products.mark_profile

lookup_rules.price_lookup: Base postage: prices/products.json (file_type product_prices) product_prices[]. Service surcharges: prices/services.json (file_type service_prices) service_prices[]
lookup_rules.service_lookup: Find service in services.json by id
lookup_rules.weight_resolution: Resolve weight_tier id from weights.json where min <= weight <= max
lookup_rules.zone_validation: Check if zone is in product's zones array

product_prices.description: Find base postage by matching product_id, zone, and weight_tier in prices/products.json (product_prices[]). Domestic and other Brief prices aligned with Briefporto 2026 and “Alle Länder – ein Preis – weltweit” (dp-preise-brief-international-2026.pdf). zone_1_eu, zone_2_europe, and world share international letter amounts. maxibrief_international_heavy = abroad 1.001–2.000 g (W2000, 17,00 €). effective_from 2026-01-01.

service_prices.description: Einschreiben and other add-on amounts in prices/services.json (+2,35 / +2,65 / +4,85 € for RM variants). effective_from 2026-01-01.
